D1 Optics L3 Apply Atom

Abbe Number of Optical Glasses

compare crown and flint glasses by their inverse-dispersion figure of merit V_d

The Abbe number compresses an entire dispersion curve into a single figure. Higher V_d means weaker chromatic spread.

Three Sellmeier curves overlay: BK7 crown (high V_d), fused silica, SF11 flint (low V_d). Slide ╬╗ to read every glass at the same wavelength; gold ticks mark the C/d/F lines used in V_d.
